articles.title_en: Dmitriev said that recognition of the energy crisis in Europe would be a step towards solving it
articles.lead_en: The Special Representative of the President of the Russian Federation for investment and economic cooperation with foreign countries also wondered whether Europe misses Nord Streams.

articles.title_en: In the Russian Federation, more than 2 thousand African students are trained in agricultural specialties
articles.lead_en: 543 people are studying at the expense of the federal budget, noted Natalya Goncharova, adviser to the director of the Agroexport federal center.

articles.lead_en: Another reason was uncontrolled migration, says the head of the RDIF

articles.title_en: The LDPR called for purchasing only products from Russian metallurgy under state orders
articles.lead_en: It is important that every budget ruble works to develop domestic industry, and not support foreign competitors, said party leader Leonid Slutsky
articles.title_raw: ЛДПР призвала закупать по госзаказу продукцию только российской металлургии

articles.title_en: Expert Ivanova-Shvets told how many places of work there can be
articles.lead_en: The law does not prohibit working in any number of organizations at the same time, said Associate Professor of the basic department of the Chamber of Commerce and Industry of the Russian Federation "Human Resource Management" of the Russian Economic University. G.
